Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0200 "FOXFIGHTSBACK-5400-0200" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $5400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Fox Fights Back!.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $5400 which copies 512 bytes of data from $5420 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400 (this is the state the memory was in after the depacker from the original game had finished - this allows us to skip this slow step). It then jumps to the entry point at $0200 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
